channel.title: Cristiano Baldassari
channel.description: Research and publications by Cristiano Baldassari

item.title: Information-Driven Modeling of Energy Markets: An Unbalanced Wasserstein Barycenter Approach
item.description: Mari C., Baldassari C. — Applied Stochastic Models in Business and Industry, Wiley (2026)

item.title: Group Detection in Energy Commodity Markets Through Manifold-Informed Wasserstein Barycenter
item.description: Mari C., Laureti T., Baldassari C. — Quality & Quantity, vol. 59, no. 3, pp. 2197–2227 (2025)

item.title: Understanding the Complexities of the Fine Structure of Interest Rates: A Wasserstein Barycenter Learning Approach
item.description: Mari C., Baldassari C. — Neural Computing and Applications, vol. 36, pp. 19291–19305 (2024)

item.title: A Graph-Based Superframework for Mixture Model Estimation Using EM: An Analysis of US Wholesale Electricity Markets
item.description: Mari C., Baldassari C. — Neural Computing and Applications, vol. 35, no. 20, pp. 14867–14883 (2023)

item.title: Optimization of Mixture Models on Time Series Networks Encoded by Visibility Graphs: An Analysis of the US Electricity Market
item.description: Mari C., Baldassari C. — Computational Management Science, vol. 20, no. 1, article 28 (2023)
